name: Nibbling Kiss
outcome: [AttackerName]'s dexterous tongue deeply entangles with [TargetName]'s as [AttackerHeOrShe] intersperses her kisses with gentle nibbles to [TargetHisOrHer] lips and tongue, sending a pleasant chill through [TargetName]'s mouth.
miss: [AttackerName] tries to deeply entangle [TargetName] into a kiss with [AttackerHisOrHer] dexterous tongue, but [TargetHeOrShe] manages to ignore the pleasant sensations and pushes [AttackerName]'s tongue back into [AttackerHisOrHer] mouth.
statusOutcome: [AttackerName]'s gentle, insistent nibbling of [TargetName]'s tongue makes [TargetHimOrHer] shiver with pleasure as an aphrodisiac begins to tingle through [TargetHisOrHer] mouth.
